text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: ae

Log:
  MFC r295969:
    Fix bug in filling and handling ipfw's O_DSCP opcode.
    Due to integer overflow CS4 token was handled as BE.

    PR:		207459
  Approved by:	re (gjb)

  stable/10/sbin/ipfw/ipfw2.c
  stable/10/sys/netpfil/ipfw/ip_fw2.c
